profile_description: I'm a software developer. I've been coding for about 5 years. I worked @ SNCF Voyageurs Nantes for about 2 years, now I'm working on Bingy, an app to track your favorite films and TV shows.
profile_description_2: When I'm not working, I enjoy playing video games, watching TV shows or movies.
